description: Welcome to Rosebury Lane. This quiet and fabulous end unit offers 3 large bdrms, 3 baths, a garage plus driveway parking, and backs onto peaceful greenspace. Enjoy an extra lrg yard and patio perfect for kids, pets, gardening, and entertaining.The upper level features 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms including a large primary suite with a walk in closet and plenty of storage. The main flr includes a convenient powder room, and 9 ft ceilings that create a bright open feel. The kitchen offers a roomy dining area with sliding doors leading directly to the patio. This family friendly complex ideally located close to schools, parks, shopping, transit, and the future SkyTrain. Roof is approx 7 years, fencing has been recently painted, brand new hot water tank. Open House Sat Feb 21 1-3
